english_query: when one person doing something first changes what others do
ugf_response:
Think about a group of people in a room. Each person wants to do something. When the first person starts to do something, the other people see it. Because they see it, they change what they do. This is how one person can change the way all the other people act.

First, we must look at how people think. People often look at what others are doing to decide what is good or what is right. If one person starts to walk in a certain way, the other people might think that is the way they should walk too. They do not do it because they were told to, but because they saw it happen.

Second, we see that the first person sets a path. Imagine a field of tall grass. If one person walks through the grass, they make a path. Now, when other people come to that same place, they will walk in that same path. They do not have to think about where to go. The first person has already made the way for them.

Third, we see that this can happen with ideas. If one person says an idea is true, it can make other people believe it is true too. Even if the idea is not true, the fact that someone said it can change how the whole group thinks. The first person acts as a starting point.

This means that the first person has a lot of power. They do not need to tell people what to do. They only need to do something, and the others will follow or change their own way so that they are the same as the first person. This is how things start to move in a group. One person starts, and then the whole group moves together in a new way.

english_query: If he turns on the light, then the room is bright. The room is bright. Therefore, he turns on the light. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea. It says that if he turns on the light, then the room is bright. This tells us what happens when he does a certain thing. It does not say that turning on the light is the only way to make the room bright. Then, we look at the second idea. It says the room is bright. We know this is true. Now we must see if the last idea follows for sure. The last idea says he turns on the light. But wait, could the room be bright for another reason? Yes. Maybe the sun is giving light through a window. Maybe another light is on. Maybe it is very bright outside. In all these cases, the first idea is still true, and the second idea is still true, but he did not turn on the light. So, we can agree with the first two ideas but still say no to the last one. This means the last idea does not follow for sure. does not follow

english_query: If it is raining, then the ground is wet. The ground is wet. Therefore, it is raining. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea. It says if the sky drops water, then the dirt below gets wet. This tells us what happens when it rains. But it does not say that rain is the only way for the dirt to get wet. Next, we look at the second idea. It tells us that the dirt is wet. Now we ask if this means it must be raining. We have to think about other ways the dirt could get wet. Maybe someone used a long thin thing to move water to the green things. Maybe a thing that holds water broke and let water out on the ground. Maybe it rained on a day before today and the dirt stayed wet. In these other stories, the dirt is wet, but it is not raining right now. Since we can imagine a time when the dirt is wet but it is not raining, the last idea does not have to be true just because the first two ideas are true. The fact that the dirt is wet does not prove that it is raining. It could be something else. So the last thing we said does not follow for sure. does not follow

english_query: why sometimes a good enough answer is better than the best answer
ugf_response:
Person number one: I want to know why we should not always look for the very best way to do a thing. If we can find the best way, why would we stop before we should?

Person number two: Sometimes looking for the very best way takes too much time. If you spend all your time looking for the perfect thing, you might run out of the time you have to do anything at all.

Person number one: But if I find a way that is not the best, will it not be bad?

Person number two: Not always. If a way works well enough to get the job done, then it is good. Think about building a house. If you spend years trying to make every single piece of wood the best piece of wood in the world, you will never live in your house.

Person number one: I see. So you are saying that time is a thing we must think about when we make choices?

Person number two: Yes. We have a small part of time and a small part of things we can use. If we use every single thing to make one thing perfect, we will have nothing left for the other things we need to do.

Person number one: So, if I have many things to do, should I just find ways that work well enough and then move to the next thing?

Person number two: That is often the best way to live. You find a way that is good, you finish it, and then you move on. This lets you finish many things instead of finishing only one thing.

Third, we look at what happens when we use a person like a thing. When we do this, we take their wants and their life and make them serve only our own wants. The thing after the third, we see that this is not good because it makes the person seem as if they do not matter. The thing after the thing after the third, we see that if we do this, we are saying that our own wants are the only ones that are real. The thing after the thing after the thing after the third, we see that every person has the same right to be seen as a person and not a thing. The thing after the thing after the thing after the thing after the third, we see that if we use a person as a thing, we are breaking the way we should act toward all people. Finally, we see that because every person is a being with their own life, using them only to get what we want is always wrong.

Person one: I want to know how to make good choices when things are hard. How can I make my own ways to pick what to do?

english_query: why treating people as things to use is always wrong
ugf_response:

Person number one: So, if I only talk to my friend because they have a car, am I acting toward them as if they were a thing?

Person number two: Yes, you are. You are not caring about the person, you are only caring about the car. You are acting toward the person as a way to get the car.

Person number one: What should I do instead to make sure I am being good?

Person number two: You must see that the other person is just as important as you are. You must care about the feeling of being happy in their life as much as your own. You should act in a way that shows you see them as a person, not as a way to get what you want.

english_query: why we should not accept something just because many people believe it
ugf_response:
Many people think that if a lot of people say something is right, then it must be right. That idea sits in the middle of a hard question. The hard question asks if we should take something as true just because many people think it, or if we should look for something else that tells us it is true. The question is hard because it makes us think about what we use to tell us what is right and what is not.

One answer that some people give is that we should go with what many think. They say that a big group of people can see many parts of a thing that one person may miss. They feel safe when they hear the same idea from many voices, and they think that many heads have checked it and found it true. They may also say that if most of the people we know and trust think it, then it is a good sign that it is true.

Another answer that other people give is that we should not take a thing as true just because many think it. They point to times in the past when many people were sure about something that later turned out not to be true. They think of times when many people said the world was flat, or when many people said a certain thing could make better a sick thing but it did not. They say that the number of people who think something does not fix the thing itself. They say we need to look at other ways to see if it fits with what we can see, what we can check, and what we can understand.

Why do the two groups give different answers? The first group trusts the feeling that many people have looked at the thing and have not found a reason to say it is wrong. They may feel that many people can catch wrong things that one mind may miss. The second group trusts the feeling that many people can also miss things together, that a group of many people can all be led by the same wrong idea, and that we need to use other ways, like looking at it with my own mind or checking it with other known facts, to see if it holds up.

In the end, the hard question does not have a single simple answer. It asks each of us to think about why we trust what we hear, how we can check it, and when we should let a view of many people lead us or when we should step back and look for another way to know. The answer may change from case to case, and it asks us to keep thinking and not stop at the first easy answer.

The first thing to look at is the part that the person says is true. They say that we do not see everything that happens in the whole world. We only see a small part of what is going on. english_query: why sometimes a good enough answer is better than the best answer

However, finding this best answer often takes a very long time and uses a lot of things like money or work. Second, we must think about an answer that is good enough. An answer that is good enough is one that is good and makes the problem go away well, even if it is not the most perfect. Third, we see that time is a thing that is always moving. If we spend all our time trying to find the best answer, we might run out of time to do anything else. The thing after the third thing, we look at the things we use to find answers, such as our power or our money. If we use everything we have to find the best answer, we will have nothing left for other things. The thing after the thing after the third thing, we can see that an answer that is good enough can be found quickly. This lets us move on to the next thing to do. The thing after the thing after the thing after the third thing, we see that the small extra good thing from having the best answer instead of an answer that is good enough is often not the same as the big number of time or work used. Finally, we understand that making a choice to use an answer that is good enough is a good way to live and work when we want to do many things well.

english_query: the problem with thinking only two choices exist when there are more
ugf_response:
Imagine a person who must choose between two ways of doing something. They see one way and they see another way. They believe these are the only two ways that can ever be. They think that if they do not pick the first way, they must pick the second way. This is a way of thinking that can lead to many ways of being wrong. It makes the world look much smaller than it really is.

The hard question is this: how do we know if we have found all the ways to do something? How can we be sure that there is not a third way or a way after the third or a way that we have not even thought of yet? When we think there are only two paths, we stop looking for more. We stop using our minds to find the best way. We only look at what is right in front of us.

Some people might say that it is okay to think this way when we are in a hurry. They might say that if we have to make a choice right now, we should just pick one of the two things we see. They think that finding more ways takes too much time and that the two ways we have are good enough. They want to move fast and not get stuck.

Other people might say that this way of thinking is very bad. They think it makes people fight more. When people think there are only two ways, they often think one way is good and the other way is bad. This makes them hate the people who pick the other way. They believe that if we look harder, we will find many more ways to live together. They believe that finding more ways can make everyone happier.

Another group of people might say that we must always be careful. They think that we should never believe there are only two ways unless we have looked at every single thing that can be. They say that our minds are not good at seeing everything at once. They think we must work hard to find the many ways that are there so we do not make a bad choice.

english_query: why we should be careful about thinking everything happens for a reason
ugf_response:
When a person thinks that all things happen because there is some big why, the thought can feel safe. It can make the mind feel that there is a shape or a plan behind each turn of life. That feeling can help a mind stay calm when a hard thing happens. But it is also good to take care of that thought and not let it run too far.

First, the thought that every turn has a big why can stop a mind from looking for the real cause that we can see. If a child falls down a step, a mind that says “it must be for a big why” may not look for the step that is not even or the shoe that does not fit well. The mind may miss the chance to fix the step or to put on a better shoe. In that way the thought can keep us from doing a thing that can make the next turn safer.

Second, the thought can make a mind point at people or groups as if they are the one who made the big why. When a person loses a job, a mind that says “it is for a big why” may point at the person who tells people what to do, the place where work happens, or the whole town. That point can hurt the way we feel about those people. It can make us feel angry or sad about them, even when the real cause may be a change in money, a thing that says what we should do, or a change in need. The hurt that comes from pointing can make the world feel more not together.

Third, the thought can keep a mind from asking what we can do now. If a storm breaks a house, a mind that says “it must be for a big why” may stay in a place of waiting, hoping the why will make sense later. In that waiting time, we may not take care of the broken top part of a house, may not move things to keep them dry, and may not ask for help. The house can get more hurt, and the people inside can get more hurt. Looking for ways we can act now, even if we do not see a big why, can keep more things safe.

It is also good to remember that many things are just the thing that comes after many small parts moving together. A ball rolls because of a push, a wind blows because of heat, a green thing that lives grows because of water and light. Those small parts do not need a big why to work. Seeing the small parts can help a mind understand how the world works and can help us make better choices.

So, it is fine to hold the thought that there may be a big why, but we should also take care to look for the real cause we can see, to not point at people in a way that hurts, and to act in the now. By doing that, we keep our mind calm, keep our world safer, and keep our hearts from being hurt by wrong points. This careful act of keeping two things even lets us stay open to both the feeling of a big why and the clear work of the small parts that we can see and change.

english_query: how the kind of person you are matters more than following rules
ugf_response:
Imagine a person who sees someone in need. This person has a set of things they must do. These things are written down by others. These written things tell the person how to act in every way. But then, the person sees a thing that makes them feel a great need to help. The written things say do not do this. The feeling inside says do help.

The hard question is this. Should a person do what is written, or should a person do what is right in their heart? Is it better to follow the written things, or is it better to be a good person?

Some people say we must follow the written things. They say that if we do not follow them, there will be no order. If everyone chose what they wanted to do instead of what was written, the world would be a bad place. They think the written things keep us safe and make sure everyone knows what to do. To them, the written things are the most important thing.

Other people say that being a good person is more important. They say that the written things can be wrong. They say that a person who only follows written things but does not think about what is good is not a person who is good in a real way. They think that what is inside a person, their heart and their mind, tells them how to act when the written things do not fit the moment. They think that doing what is right for the person in front of you is the most important thing.

This is a hard way to think. It asks us to look at the things we are told to do and the things we feel we must do. It asks if we are just people who follow words, or if we are people who know how to be good.

english_query: when we have good reason to think a thing will or will not happen

The first idea is that we have reasons to believe a thing will or will not happen. This means we look at what we know now to guess what will happen later. The person says that these reasons are good. This is the part that we take as true for this talk. We accept that there are ways to look at the world that give us a way to see what is coming.

The second idea is what follows from having these good reasons. If we have these reasons, then we should act in a certain way. We should use what we know to make choices. english_query: why people fear losing more than they enjoy winning the same amount
ugf_response:
Imagine a person who finds one hundred pieces of gold on the ground. They feel good and happy. Now imagine a person who loses one hundred pieces of gold from their pocket. They feel very bad and sad. Even though the number of pieces is the same, the bad feeling from what is gone is much bigger than the good feeling from what is found. This happens to many people in many ways. It is not just about money. It can be about how we act or how we make choices.

The hard question is why our minds work this way. Why does the pain of what is gone feel so much stronger than the good feeling from what is found that is the very same size? If we were thinking in a way that only looked at the numbers, the two things should feel the same. But our minds do not work like machines that only look at numbers. Our minds have a way of looking at things that makes losing feel like a great weight, while winning feels like a small light.

Some people say this happens because of how we stay alive. Long ago, if a person lost food or a place to sleep, they might die. If they found extra food, they would just be a little more happy. But losing what you need is a very big thing that can end your life. So, our minds learned to pay much more attention to things that could hurt us. We are built to look for things that can kill us and to run from them. This makes us feel a very large part of fear when we might lose something.

Other people say this is because of how we see the world. When we win, we think we are doing what we should do, but we do not think about it for very long. But when something is gone, it feels like something is wrong with us or our way of life. The thing that is gone feels like a wrong thing that we must fix. This makes the feeling of what is gone stay in our heads for a long time. Because of this, we often choose to do nothing rather than take a chance where we might lose, even if the chance to win is very great.

english_query: what it means to really know a thing and not just believe it
ugf_response:
To understand how to tell the way one thing is not like the way another thing is when you think something is true and when you really know it, we must look at three different parts. Imagine you have a thought in your head about how the world works. This thought might be a guess or something you feel is true. But a thought in your head is not the same as knowing.

The first part is that the thing must be true. If you think the sun will come up tomorrow, but it does not, then you did not know it. You were wrong. You cannot know something that is not true. To know something, it must be a real thing that stays the same for everyone.

The second part is that you must believe it. If you say you know that a certain man takes things that do not belong to him, but in your heart you do not think he does this, then you do not know it. You cannot say you know a thing if you do not think it is true. You must hold the thought in your mind as something real.

The third part is the most important. This is what makes a thought different from a lucky guess. To know for sure, you must have a good reason for your thought. Imagine a man who guesses how many small round food things are in a glass box. He says there are one hundred small round food things. He is right, but he did not know it. He just guessed. He had no way to show why he was right. To know, you must be able to show why your thought is true. You must see the things that make it true. You must have a way to show that your thought is not just a lucky guess.

So, to know a thing, three things must happen at the same time. First, the thing must be true in the real world. Second, you must believe it is true. Third, you must have a very good reason that shows why it is true. If you only have one or two of these, you do not have the state of knowing. You only have a thought or a guess. When you have all three, you can say you know.

ugf_response:

The second thing they think comes after that is that we can find the best reason by looking at a few things. They say we should see which reason fits the facts we see the most, which reason is the most easy to understand, and which reason helps us get the thing we want. They also say that if a reason does all those things better than the others, then it should be the one we pick. This part is the idea about what should happen if the first thing is true.  

The third thing we look at is whether the way they think works well. The steps they give do make sense in a simple way: looking at how well a reason fits the facts helps us stay close to what we see, choosing a most easy to understand reason helps us not get lost, and choosing a reason that helps us get what we want keeps the reason able to be used. When those three checks are used together, they usually lead us toward a reason that is more able to be right. The thinking is good as long as we really do check each reason with those three checks and do not leave out any reason that might also fit. If we follow the steps, we are less able to be wrong about a reason that only sounds nice but does not fit the facts. So in the end the way of picking a reason is a way that makes sense to try to find the best one among many.

english_query: If the river is high, then the bank is flooded. The river is low. Therefore, the bank is dry. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea. It says that if the water is up high, then the ground by the water gets wet. This tells us what happens when the water is high. It does not say what happens when the water is not high. Next, we look at the second idea. It tells us that the water is low. This means the water is not high. Now we need to see if we can be sure the ground is dry. Just because the water is low, we do not know for sure that the ground is dry. Maybe it rained a lot in the past and the ground is still wet. Maybe someone poured water on the ground. The first idea only talks about high water. It does not stop the ground from being wet for other reasons. So, we can agree that high water means wet ground, and we can agree that the water is low, but we can still imagine a story where the ground is wet. Because that story is possible, the last idea does not have to be true. does not follow

english_query: Still old number man, I am afraid that I will not be able to do what the young person asks.
ugf_response: Not do it! for what reason?

english_query: It looks like if there is a reason that can make something happen then something will happen. Because a reason that makes nothing happen is a bad reason and needs something else to make the thing happen. But god is the reason that can make the world happen. He is the last reason because he is good, the main reason because he knows, and the strong reason because he has power as we saw above. Since god is always, the world is also always.
ugf_response: Just like what comes after comes from a reason that works by the way things are in the way they are made, so also what comes after comes from a person who chooses it in the way that person planned and set. As we saw above. So even though god was always the reason that can make the world we should not say the world was made by him except as he chose it to be, that it should be after not be so we can see his hand more clear.

english_query: If god chooses to leave some men out, it must be the same for them as it is for those he picks. But picking someone is the reason they get to be safe. So leaving someone out would be the reason they get lost. But this is not right. For the words say: 'Your end is your own, people of the old land; Your help is only in Me.' So god does not choose to leave any man out.
ugf_response: Leaving out is not the same as picking. Picking is the cause of what they get later, like being great, and what they get now, like good help. But leaving out is not the cause of what they do now, like doing wrong; it is the cause of god turning away. It is the cause of what they get later, like long pain. But the wrong comes from the free choice of the person who is left out and has no good help. This makes the words of the old speaker true: 'Your end is your own, people of the old land.'

english_query: If the road is icy, then driving is dangerous. Driving is not dangerous. Therefore, the road is not icy. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First we look at the first line. It says that if the road is full of cold water then driving is not safe. That means the first part is the road being full of cold water and the second part is driving being not safe. Then we look at the second line. It says driving is safe. That tells us the second part of the first line is not right. If the first line is right, the only way for its second part to be not right is for its first part to be not right. So the road is not full of cold water. That means the last line follows. follows

english_query: the way to help yourself think about hard questions step by step
ugf_response:
When you want to know if a thing is true or if a thing is good, you must go through a slow way of thinking. Many people try to find the answer too fast. They feel a thing in their heart and say it is true. This is not a good way to find the truth. To think well, you must take a thing and break it into many small parts. You must look at each small part one by one.

The hard question is how to make sure your mind does not make you see things that are not there. Your mind likes to take short ways. It likes to believe things that make you feel good or things that you already believe. This makes it hard to see what is actually there. If you do not take the slow way, you might believe something that is not true, or you might do something that hurts people.

Some people say the best way is to look at what happens after you do something. They think that if the end of what you do brings good things to many people, then what you did was good. They look at the end point to find the answer. They say we should make the most good for the most people. This is one way to think.

Other people say that some things are just wrong, no matter what happens at the end. They think that certain ways of doing things are always bad, even if they bring good things later. They say you must do what is right in the moment. They think that if you do a bad thing to get a good end, you have still done a bad thing.

There is also a way of thinking where you look at what you can know for sure. These people say you should only believe what you have seen or what you can show is true with what you know. They do not like to guess about things that cannot be seen. They say that if you cannot show how a thing works, you should not say it is true.

To think well, you must use all these ways. First, you break the big thing into small pieces. Second, you look at each piece and ask if it is true. Third, you look at what happens if you believe it. The way after the third thing, you look at what happens if you do it. By doing this, you do not let your fast mind lead you into a wrong way.

english_query: If the road is icy, then driving is dangerous. The road is icy. Therefore, driving is dangerous. Is this argument valid or invalid? Explain your reasoning.
ugf_response: First, we look at the first idea which says that if the road has ice on it, then driving is not safe. Then, we see the second idea tells us that the road does have ice on it. Because the first part of the if-then idea is true, the second part must also be true. So, it is true that driving is not safe. follows

english_query: why the rules should be the same for everyone
ugf_response:
To start, think about a play that many people do. In that play there is a group of things that tell each person what they may do and what they may not do. If some people have one group and other people have a different group, then the play can become hard to do. One person might think they can take a turn that another person thinks is not right. This can cause people to fight, to feel sad, and to stop having fun. When the group of what is right is the same for all people, each person knows what they can do and what they can not do. They can plan their moves, they can trust that other people will follow the same thoughts, and they can feel safe that no one will get extra help just because they have a different group.

Now think about life that we all live in. In life there are many things that we all need to share: ways, water, air, places to work, places to learn. If one person is right to take more of these things than another person, then the person with less may not have enough to stay well or to be able to go to school. This can make the group as a whole less strong, because people who are hurt can not help the group. If the thoughts about what each person may take or do are the same for all, then each person can get the same number of parts of what the group makes, and each person can give back in a way that is the same as what they get.

Also, when we all use the same thoughts about what we must do, we can trust each other more. Trust comes from knowing that the other person is playing by the same thoughts. If we do not know that, we may think the other person will try to break the group, and then we may have to watch them all the time, which uses time and the power to do work that could be used for other good things.

Finally, having the same thoughts for all helps us find a way to fix hard things together. When a hard thing comes up, we can talk about it using the same thoughts, and we can find a way that works for everyone because we all start from the same place. If we each start from a different place, then we may never say yes on a way to fix the hard thing.

In short, having the same group of thoughts that tell us what we may do and what we must not do helps people feel safe, helps the group stay strong, helps us trust each other, and helps us work together to fix hard things. That is why the thoughts should be the same for all.

english_query: how paying close attention to what someone needs is a kind of good
ugf_response:
Person number one: Why is it good to look with great care at what another person needs?

Person number two: It is good because it shows you care about their life. When you see what they do not have, you can help them feel better or make their life easier.

Person number one: But if I spend all my time looking at what they need, will I forget about my own needs?

Person number two: Not if you do it in a good way. Doing this is a way to be a good person. It is not just about giving things. It is about seeing the real state of things for them.

Person number one: How can seeing the real state of things for them be a good thing?

Person number two: When you see what they really need, you stop thinking only about yourself. You move from your own small world into a larger world where you and other people are joined together. This being joined together is a high and good thing.

Person number one: So, it is like a way to make the world a better place by knowing what is happening?

Person number two: Yes. If everyone looked with great care at the needs of those around them, there would be much less pain and much more help where it is needed most.

english_query: Gold is a thing that is good to have.
ugf_response: But if gold were easy to find like rocks, we would not want it much. If water were hard to find, we would want it much. The way we feel about a thing changes because of how often we see it. So we cannot say if gold is really good to have in itself. We do not say either yes or no.

english_query: I am not only out of heart, but in sad; for I do not know what to answer if anyone asks me: the bright young one, have you really found that a wrong idea comes not from looking at sense with each other nor from the mind, but from mind and sense together? Yes, I will say, with the happy feeling of one who thinks he has made a good find.
ugf_response: I see no reason we should feel bad about our show, the old teacher.

english_query: why some things you must never do to another person no matter what
ugf_response: First, we must think about what it means to be a person. Each person is a thing that can feel pain and feel good things. We can see that when we hurt a person, they feel bad in their body and in their mind. Second, we must think about how we want other people to act toward us. Most people do not want to be hurt or made to feel small. Third, we look at the idea of a way to live that works for everyone. If we say it is okay to hurt people to get what we want, then anyone could hurt you to get what they want. This would make the world a place of fear where no one is safe. The thing after the third step is that we see that if we want a world where we can live together, we must have ways to act that do not hurt the others. If we do not have these ways, the whole group will fall to pieces. The thing after the thing after the third step is that we find that some things are so bad that they break the way people stay together. If you do these things, you are saying that other people do not matter. This is not a good way to live because it makes life something that cannot be. Because of this, we must not do these things so that we can all live in a way that is not fighting and stay safe.
